verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I glory in my Jesus; I delight to sing His praise I glory in His goodness; I glory in His grace Help and refuge in my weakness Hope and healing when I fall I glory in my Jesus, Who redeems my soul from hell

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Born of Mary; born of mercy; Born of love for all mankind Born to carry all our sorrow; Born to suffer; born to die Come to fit us for His kingdom Come to save my soul from sin I glory in my Jesus, and forever trust in Him

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I glory in my Jesus; God of power, God of might Guide and guardian through the darkness; God of everlasting light Swift to seek me though I wander Swift to comfort and forgive I glory in my Jesus, and in Him my soul shall live
